title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Atul Projects - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Atul Projects - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Atul Projects has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Atul Projects:
Atul Projects is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atul Projects!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
